# 26.HiSolutions.ISO-Themenfeld

## State
Client/stakeholder: HiSolutions internal (Christian Friedrich context)
Scope: Redesign ISO topic field page, fix SharePoint slide layout, research and translate threat catalogues to German
Phase: notice → question

## Constraints
- SharePoint page exists at: https://hisolutions365.sharepoint.com/sites/ThemenfeldISMS/SitePages/ISO27001.aspx
- Current layout described as "komisch" (weird/awkward)
- Need German translation for threat catalogues
- Unknown deadline — clarify needed

## Decisions
- (none yet)

## Plan

- [ ] 2. Review current SharePoint page and document specific layout issues
- [ ] 3. Research threat catalogues for ISO 27001 context
- [ ] 4. Translate threat catalogue content to German
- [ ] 5. Fix SharePoint slide/page presentation
